description: Install logical input ACTION bindings: map an action name to keyboard codes and/or an on-screen rect/zone, so movers read world.input.action(...)/actionVector(...) and one action is satisfiable by keyboard OR touch — no synthesized key events. Pure data; idle on desktop with no touch. Pair with a mover's `moveAction`/`thrustAction`-style param.

bindings.description: Record<actionName, { keys?: string[], rect?: {x,y,w,h}, axisKeys?: {up,down,left,right}, zone?: {x,y,radius} }> — action sources (structural/world-space coords).
